subject: english
learning_objectives: Identify the future forms used in the lesson
Explain how simple future and future continuous are expressed

sections.heading: Simple Future
sections.content: The note explains that simple future may use shall and will, be going to plus infinitive, or simple present with an expression of future time.

sections.heading: Future Continuous
sections.content: Future progressive or continuous is expressed with a progressive form plus an expression indicating future time, as in Adamu is leaving tomorrow.
